disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapidly worsening bilateral leg swelling extending to the thighs, with a roughly 5 kg weight gain over the past month
trigger_question_examples: How bad is the swelling and how far up does it go?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Both legs are huge and shiny now, right up to the thighs, and the scales say he's about 5 kilos heavier than last month.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Two days of persistent nausea and vomiting with almost no oral intake, plus a metallic taste and whole-body itch without a rash
trigger_question_examples: Is he able to keep food or fluids down?
Any nausea, itching or change in taste?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He hasn't kept anything down for two days, he's itching all over with no rash, and he keeps saying he has a metal taste in his mouth.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known long-standing declining kidney function, on ramipril (an ACE inhibitor) and amlodipine for blood pressure
trigger_question_examples: Does he have any ongoing medical conditions?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's had kidney disease for years that's been slowly getting worse, and he takes ramipril and amlodipine for his blood pressure.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound fatigue leaving him bedbound, with restless legs and night-time muscle cramps and staff-noticed pallor
trigger_question_examples: How is his energy and how is he coping day to day?
Any cramps, restless legs or looking pale?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's completely wiped out and stuck in bed, his legs are restless and cramp at night, and he looks really pale.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High blood pressure reading on the facility cuff and a borderline-fast breathing rate
trigger_question_examples: Do the staff have a recent blood pressure reading?
Is his breathing faster than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The cuff read 175 over 100, and his breathing seems a little faster than normal, though he's not gasping at rest.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Prominent nocturia (up several times overnight to pass urine)
trigger_question_examples: How is he going with passing urine?
Is he up at night to go to the toilet?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's up several times through the night needing to pass urine.
